author: Nishchay M Chandra
name: 10L Slide64 Mid6 (TiedLR 0.08)
blurb: 10-layer 512-dim SP-1024 run with sliding-window exact eval at 1024/64, Muon crossover schedule, spectral embedding init, phase residual-mix init, fp16 tied-embedding passthrough, and mixed export with only middle blocks 3-6 at int6. Valid under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
